summary: ANDROID 🤖 Falcon Charge Stand displays on User Guides screen but it shouldn't
scenario: Falcon Charge Stand incorrectly appears as a sub-device on the User Guides screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app
description_clean: The Falcon Charge Stand is incorrectly displayed on the User Guides screen in the app. The charge stand should not appear as a sub-device in this screen.
steps: Tap on the User Guides option
Observe the list of devices and accessories displayed
expected: The Falcon Charge Stand should NOT appear as a sub-device on the User Guides screen.
actual: The Falcon Charge Stand is incorrectly displayed as a sub-device on the User Guides screen.
